About

Visual storytelling
rooted in truth.

JODA is a Brooklyn-based photographer and videographer specializing in portraits, editorial work, and wedding photography. Every frame is an honest moment — no forced poses, no manufactured light. Just people, as they are.

Couples &
Weddings

Love, documented honestly.

Every couple has a story that only they know — the way they look at each other, the quiet in-between moments, the unscripted laughter. I'm there to catch all of it.

We capture the full story — from the proposal to the first dance.
